calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-14-2016 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Lynn O'Malley-Taylor; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Third Baptist Gardens, Inc. IS NOT PRESENT.
Attorney Paige Simmons for the plaintiff.
Defendant Juan Marsh IS NOT PRESENT.

At the calling of the calendar Ms. Simmons informs the Court that neither the Plaintiff or the defendant are present because Plaintiff will be seeking a continuance. After the casewas assigned Ms. Simmoms informed the Court that plaintiff will be filing a dismissal. There was no meet and confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of OCT-17-2016 remains on calendar. (501)

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-22-2016 Continued To Oct-17-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2016 Continued To Oct-13-16 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Line 6
Judge Pro Tem: Anne Wong, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Third Baptist Gardens is present. There is no Property Manager present.
Attorney Paige Simmons for the plaintiff.
Defendant Juan Marsh is present.
Attorney David Wurzburg appearing for the defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The msc is continued to 10/13/16 and The trial date of September 26, 2016 is continued to 10/17/16. (501)
